description: Hand-polished gold Hearted reads in the redesigned { read } shape (ConceptReadSchema: image, lens, tension, take, contradiction, arc, lines, texture). The bar the pairwise judge measures candidates against (gold-vs-candidate). Promoted from concept-data.ts in Session 5; dashes normalized to the no-dash voice rule. Keyed by spotifyTrackId so they match experiment runs regardless of label formatting. Edit the prose freely; it defines 'reads like Hearted'.
